title: People
description: Enrolled voiceprints used to identify speakers across recordings. Voiceprints are biometric data — only enrol people with their consent, and erase them when required.
empty: No people yet. Enrol someone from a recording's speaker (“+ New person…”).
confirmEraseAll: Erase ALL your voiceprints? Auto-identified labels revert to anonymous; names you typed are kept.
confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"? Auto-identified labels revert; typed names are kept.
